indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Number of Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) Program is the federal government’s major program for providing housing assistance to over 2.3 million American families.

indicators.label: Share of HCV Households in Ethnically Concentrated Areas of Poverty (R/ECAPs) Tracts
indicators.description:
Share of HCV Households in Ethnically Concentrated Areas of Poverty (R/ECAPs) Tracts.
RECAP: Neighborhoods where racial/ethnic concentration and deep poverty overlap.
Definition: In the HUD AFFH context, an R/ECAP is generally a census tract with a non-White population share of at least 50%, and a poverty rate of at least 40% or three times the CBSA-area tract average poverty rate, whichever threshold is lower.

indicators.label: Share of HCV Households in Racially Concentrated Areas of Affluence (RCAAs) Tracts
indicators.description:
Share of HCV Households in Racially Concentrated Areas of Affluence (RCAAs) Tracts.
RCAA: a neighborhood at the opposite end of the segregation continuum from R/ECAP, representing the spatial concentration of whiteness and affluence. It refers to advantaged neighborhoods where racial concentration and high income overlap.
Definition: A census tract with at least 80% White residents and median household income at or above two times the national median household income in the reference year.

indicators.label: HCV-Weighted Child Opportunoty Index
indicators.description: Average neighborhood opportunity exposure of HCV households within a CBSA: Sum of (tract COI score × tract HCV household count) divided by sum of tract HCV household count

indicators.label: Renter-Weighted Child Opportunoty Index
indicators.description: Average neighborhood opportunity exposure of all renter households in a CBSA

indicators.label: HCV-Weighted Child Opportunoty Index – Education Domain
indicators.description: Average education domain neighborhood opportunity exposure of HCV households in a CBSA

indicators.label: Renter-Weighted Child Opportunoty Index – Education Domain
indicators.description: Average Education Domain neighborhood opportunity exposure of all renter households in a CBSA

indicators.label: HCV-Weighted Child Opportunoty Index – Health & Environment Domain
indicators.description: Average Health & Environment Domain neighborhood opportunity exposure of HCV households in a CBSA

indicators.label: Renter-Weighted Child Opportunoty Index – Health & Environment Domain
indicators.description: Average Health & Environment Domain neighborhood opportunity exposure of all renter households in a CBSA

indicators.label: HCV-Weighted Child Opportunoty Index – Social & Economic Domain
indicators.description: Average Social & Economic Domain neighborhood opportunity exposure of HCV households in a CBSA

indicators.label: Renter-Weighted Child Opportunoty Index – Social & Economic Domain
indicators.description: Average Social & Economic Domain  neighborhood opportunity exposure of all renter households in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Potential Voucher Need-30%HAMFI (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Number of renter households with income less than or equal to 30 percent of HAMFI in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Potential Voucher Need-50%HAMFI (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Number of renter households with income less than or equal to 50 percent of HAMFI in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Potential Voucher Need-80%HAMFI (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Number of renter households with income less than or equal to 80 percent of HAMFI in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Potential Voucher Need-100%HAMFI (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Number of renter households with income less than or equal to 100 percent of HAMFI in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Potential Voucher Need-All Income Bands (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Number of renter households across all published income bands in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Voucher Need Gap -30%HAMFI
indicators.description: Difference between income-based potential voucher need at 30 percent HAMFI and existing HCV households in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Voucher Need Gap -50%HAMFI
indicators.description: Difference between income-based potential voucher need at 50 percent HAMFI and existing HCV households in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Voucher Need Gap -80%HAMFI
indicators.description: Difference between income-based potential voucher need at 80 percent HAMFI and existing HCV households in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Voucher Need Gap -100%HAMFI
indicators.description: Difference between income-based potential voucher need at 100 percent HAMFI and existing HCV households in a CBSA

indicators.label: Income-based Voucher Need Gap -All Income Bands
indicators.description: Difference between income-based potential voucher need across all income bands and existing HCV households in a CBSA

indicators.label: Eligibility Mismatch-30%HAMFI
indicators.description: Difference between the remaining income-based voucher need gap at 30 percent HAMFI and the number of affordable, qualified, and vacant rental units at the same affordability level in a CBSA

indicators.label: Eligibility Mismatch-50%HAMFI
indicators.description: Difference between the remaining income-based voucher need gap at 50 percent HAMFI and the number of affordable, qualified, and vacant rental units at the same affordability level in a CBSA

indicators.label: Eligibility Mismatch-80%HAMFI
indicators.description: Difference between the remaining income-based voucher need gap at 80 percent HAMFI and the number of affordable, qualified, and vacant rental units at the same affordability level in a CBSA

indicators.label: Eligibility Mismatch-100%HAMFI
indicators.description: Not directly computable from published CHAS Table 14B because aqv_100 is not isolated

indicators.label: Eligibility Mismatch-All Income Bands
indicators.description: Difference between the remaining income-based voucher need gap across all income bands and the number of affordable, qualified, and vacant rental units across all rent levels in a CBSA

indicators.label: HCV tract-Average Median Gross Rent (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: hcv_neighborhood_median_gross_rent = sum(tract_median_gross_rent * tract_hcv_25) / sum(tract_hcv_25)

indicators.label: Median Gross Rent (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Median monthly housing cost for renter-occupied units, including utilities.

indicators.label: Number of Affordable, Qualified and Vacant Units for Rent-30%HAMFI (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Vacant-for-rent, housing unit has complete kitchen and plumbing facilities, rent <= RHUD30 (T14B_est4)

indicators.label: Number of Affordable, Qualified and Vacant Units for Rent-50%HAMFI (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Vacant-for-rent, housing unit has complete kitchen and plumbing facilities, rent <= RHUD50 (T14B_est4+T14B_est8)

indicators.label: Number of Affordable, Qualified and Vacant Units for Rent-80%HAMFI (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Vacant-for-rent, housing unit has complete kitchen and plumbing facilities, rent <= RHUD80 (T14B_est4+T14B_est8+T14B_est12)

indicators.label: Number of Affordable, Qualified and Vacant Units for Rent-100%HAMFI (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Not directly available from published CHAS Table 14B; RHUD80-RHUD100 is not isolated because the source only publishes a combined >RHUD80 bucket

indicators.label: Number of Affordable, Qualified and Vacant Units for Rent-All Income Bands (HUD CHAS Data, ACS2018-2022)
indicators.description: Vacant-for-rent, housing unit has complete kitchen and plumbing facilities, all rent levels (T14B_est3)

indicators.label: Rent Burdened Households (%) (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Share of renter households spending more than 30% of income on rent.

indicators.label: Severely Rent Burdened Households (%) (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Share of renter households spending more than 50% of income on rent.

indicators.label: HCV tract-Average Median Household Income (ACS, 2020-2024)
indicators.description: HCV-weighted average Median income of households over the past 12 months.

indicators.label: Median Household Income (ACS, 2020-2024)
indicators.description: Median income of households over the past 12 months.

indicators.label: Poverty Rate (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Share of individuals with income below the federal poverty threshold.

indicators.label: HCV tract-Share of High Poverty Rate(%) Tracts (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Share of tracts that have HCV users in a CBSA with more than 20% of poverty rate.

indicators.label: Share of High Poverty Rate(20%) Tracts (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Share of tracts in a CBSA with more than 20% of poverty rate.

indicators.label: Minority Share (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Share of population that is not Non-Hispanic White, consistent with HUD definitions of minority concentration.

indicators.label: Population Age 65+ (%) (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Share of population aged 65 and over.

indicators.label: Educational Attainment: Bachelor's Degree or Higher (%) (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Share of population aged 25+ with a bachelor’s degree or higher.

indicators.label: Unemployment Rate (ACS, 2020–2024)
indicators.description: Share of the labor force that is unemployed.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Occupied Units(HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Number of occupied units under contract for federal subsidy.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Percent Occupied (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Occupied units as the % of units available.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Reported Count (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Number of households for which reports (Form-50058

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Percent Reported (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Households for which reports were received

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Months Since Report (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Average number of months between the household submissions and the date of the Picture snapshot.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Percent Moved In Past Year (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Percentage of households who were in the program less than a year from the date of Picture snapshot.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers People per Unit (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Average size of household.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers People Total (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Total number of people.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Rent per Month (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Average gross household contribution towards rent per month includes payment toward rent and utilities and excludes zero values and missing values.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Spending per Month (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Average federal spending per unit-month.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Household Income (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Average total household income per year.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Person Income (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Average household income per person per year.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Share Below 80 Percent Median (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Percentage of households with income below 80% of local area median family income.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Share Below 50 Percent Median (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Percentage of households with income below 50% of local area median family income

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Share Below 30 Percent Median (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Percentage of households with income below 30% of local area median family income

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Months Waiting (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Average months on waiting list using the date entered waiting list and the new admission date. Excludes programs that do not report waiting list dates.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Months From Move-In (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Average months since households moved in as difference between the admission date and date of Picture snapshot. Excludes zero values.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Utility Allowance Share (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Percentage of households that receive a non-zero utility allowance payment.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Average Utility Allowance (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Average utility allowance among households who have it in dollars per month. This is an estimate of the utilities that the household pays to the utility company. Utility allowances are zero if all utilities are included in the rent. Excludes zero values.

indicators.label: Housing Choice Vouchers Overhoused Share (HUD, 2025)
indicators.description: Percent overhoused households with more bedrooms than people.
